narrative:
Darby Clarks Lake (precinct in Pickaway County) has 657 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.7 percentage points.
